records.question: Which San Jose City Hall stations in San Jose have exactly 15 docks, are located at latitude 37.337391 and longitude at most -121.886995, and were installed on 8/6/2013?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
WHERE station.long <= -121.886995 AND station.city = 'San Jose' AND station.lat = 37.337391 AND station.dock_count = 15 AND station.installation_date = '8/6/2013' AND station.name = 'San Jose City Hall'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT station.id 
FROM station 
WHERE city = 'San Jose' 
  AND name LIKE '%City Hall%' 
  AND dock_count = 15 
  AND lat = 37.337391 
  AND long <= -121.886995 
  AND installation_date = '8/6/2013'

records.question: What stations in San Francisco named Mechanics Plaza (Market at Battery) that were installed on 8/25/2013 have at least 19 docks and are positioned at a longitude no less than -122.399051 and a latitude no more than 37.7913?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
WHERE station.city = 'San Francisco' AND station.long >= -122.399051 AND station.lat <= 37.7913 AND station.name = 'Mechanics Plaza (Market at Battery)' AND station.installation_date = '8/25/2013' AND station.dock_count >= 19
records.pred_sql:
SELECT station.id 
FROM station 
WHERE name = 'Mechanics Plaza (Market at Battery)' 
  AND city = 'San Francisco' 
  AND installation_date = '8/25/2013' 
  AND dock_count >= 19 
  AND long >= -122.399051 
  AND lat <= 37.7913

records.question: What stations in Redwood City that were installed on 8/12/2013 have a latitude at most 37.481758, a longitude at least -122.226904, a dock count at most 15, and on or before 2015-06-02 13:00:01 had exactly 3 bikes available and no more than 12 docks available?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
JOIN status ON station.id = status.station_id
WHERE station.lat <= 37.481758 AND status.bikes_available = 3 AND station.city = 'Redwood City' AND station.dock_count <= 15 AND status.docks_available <= 12 AND status.time <= '2015-06-02 13:00:01' AND station.installation_date = '8/12/2013' AND station.long >= -122.226904
records.pred_sql:
SELECT station.id 
FROM station 
JOIN status ON station.id = status.station_id 
WHERE station.city = 'Redwood City' 
  AND station.installation_date = '2013-08-12' 
  AND station.lat <= 37.481758 
  AND station.long >= -122.226904 
  AND station.dock_count <= 15 
  AND status.time <= '2015-06-02 13:00:01' 
  AND status.bikes_available = 3 
  AND status.docks_available <= 12
